message:
fix: allow board columns to shrink below 12 chars on very narrow terminals

The safety loop that prevents column overflow had a floor of 12 that
could not be breached even when numCols * 14 exceeded the available
width. This caused horizontal overflow and line wrapping on narrow
terminals with many columns. Lower the absolute floor to 4 so columns
can shrink to fit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
